mapper.select: /* ====== cmn.menu.menuPrgmMstListXXXXXXXX =========*/ SELECT A.*, nvl(LAG(MENU_LVL ) OVER( ORDER BY ROW_INDEX ),-1) MENU_LVL_PREV FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM ROW_INDEX , ROWNUM -1 id , A.MENU_ID MENU_ID , A.MENU_LVL || '' MENU_LVL , A.MENU_NM text , A.MENU_DSC , A.HGHR_MENU_ID , A.ALGN_SEQ , A.USG_YN , A.LMT_ORGN_LVL_CD , A.DUTY_NM , A.DEL_YN , A.DUTY_ID , B.PRGM_ID , B.PRGM_NM , B.PRGM_DESC , B.PRGM_URL URL , B.PRGM_TYPE , nvl(PRIOR A.MENU_LVL,-1) MENU_LVL_PRIOR FROM CMN_MENU_MST A, CMN_PRGM_MST B WHERE A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID(+) AND ( A.DEL_YN IS NULL OR A.DEL_YN = 'N') AND B.PRGM_TYPE(+) = 'MAIN' START WITH A.MENU_LVL = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR A.MENU_ID = A.HGHR_MENU_ID ORDER SIBLINGS BY 1+ A.ALGN_SEQ ) A

/* ====== cmn.menu.menuPrgmMstList =========*/ SELECT A.*, nvl(LAG(MENU_LVL ) OVER( ORDER BY ROW_INDEX ),-1) MENU_LVL_PREV FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM ROW_INDEX , ROWNUM -1 id , A.MENU_ID MENU_ID , A.MENU_LVL || '' MENU_LVL , nvl(PRIOR A.MENU_LVL,-1) MENU_LVL_PRIOR , replace(RPAD(' ', 4*(LEVEL - 1)),' ','.') || A.MENU_NM MENU_NM_HGHR , A.MENU_NM text , A.MENU_DSC , A.HGHR_MENU_ID , A.ALGN_SEQ , A.USG_YN , A.LMT_ORGN_LVL_CD , A.DUTY_NM , A.DEL_YN , A.DUTY_ID , A.IBSHEET_YN , DECODE(A.IBSHEET_YN, 'Y', 'background-color:#A0AFFF;font-weight:bold;', '') AS STYLE , B.PRGM_ID , B.PRGM_NM , B.PRGM_DESC , B.PRGM_URL URL , B.PRGM_TYPE FROM CMN_MENU_MST A, CMN_PRGM_MST B WHERE A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID(+) AND ( A.DEL_YN IS NULL OR A.DEL_YN = 'N') AND B.PRGM_TYPE(+) = 'MAIN' AND A.MENU_ID NOT IN ('PPS1300004', 'PPS1100007', 'MSP1020220', 'PSC1000000', 'PSC1000030', 'PSC0000001', 'PSC0000002') START WITH A.MENU_LVL = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR A.MENU_ID = A.HGHR_MENU_ID AND ( A.USG_YN = 'Y' OR A.USG_YN IS NULL ) ORDER SIBLINGS BY 1 + A.ALGN_SEQ )A WHERE A.MENU_ID IN ( SELECT A.MENU_ID FROM CMN_MENU_MST A START WITH A.MENU_ID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT MENU_ID FROM ( SELECT A.MENU_ID FROM CMN_MENU_MST A WHERE A.MENU_LVL = 0 UNION SELECT B.MENU_ID FROM CMN_USR_MST A ,CMN_USR_MENU_ASGN_MST B WHERE A.USR_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ID} AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID UNION SELECT D.MENU_ID FROM CMN_USR_MST A ,CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST B ,CMN_GRP_AUTH_ASGN_MST C ,CMN_AUTH_MENU_ASGN_MST D WHERE 1 =1 AND A.USR_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ID} AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND B.GRP_ID = C.GRP_ID AND C.AUTH_ID = D.AUTH_ID ) ) CONNECT BY A.MENU_ID = PRIOR A.HGHR_MENU_ID ) ORDER BY A.ROW_INDEX
